data.title: compute-diff-hash.sh fails when called via absolute REPO_ROOT path in worktree sessions
data.description:
Orchestrators that construct the path as $REPO_ROOT/plugins/dso/scripts/compute-diff-hash.sh get exit 127 in worktree sessions because the script lives in the plugin cache (~/.claude/plugins/), not in the worktree repo tree.

Repro:
  REPO_ROOT=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)
  bash "$REPO_ROOT/plugins/dso/scripts/compute-diff-hash.sh"
  # Error: No such file or directory

Fix: Use the shim .claude/scripts/dso compute-diff-hash.sh which resolves correctly.
Affected: any orchestrator or sub-agent that builds the path via REPO_ROOT instead of the shim.
The COMMIT-WORKFLOW.md and sprint SKILL.md should be audited to ensure they use the shim path only.
